{{Short description|Film award ceremony in 2009}} {{Use mdy dates|date=February 2025}} {{Infobox film awards | number = 66 | award = Golden Globe Awards | image = | caption = | date = January 11, 2009 | network = [[NBC]] |site=[[Beverly Hilton Hotel]]
[[Beverly Hills]], [[Los Angeles]], [[California]]| best_film_drama = ''[[Slumdog Millionaire]]'' | best_film_musical_or_comedy = ''[[Vicky Cristina Barcelona]]'' | best_drama_series = ''[[Mad Men]]'' | best_musical_or_comedy_series = ''[[30 Rock]]'' | best_miniseries_or_tv_movie = ''[[John Adams (miniseries)|John Adams]]'' |most_wins=(4) ''Slumdog Millionaire''|most_nominations=(5) '' [[The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (film)|The Curious Case of Benjamin Button]] ''

'' [[Frost/Nixon (film)|Frost/Nixon]] ''| last = 65th | next = 67th }} The '''66th [[Golden Globe Award]]s''', honoring the best in [[film]] and [[television]] of 2008, was broadcast on January 11, 2009, from the [[Beverly Hilton Hotel]] in [[Beverly Hills, California]], United States on the [[NBC]] television network. The broadcast was watched by approximately 14.6 million viewers with a rating of 4.9/12. The ceremony returned after the previous year's ceremony was canceled due to the [[2007–08 Writers Guild of America strike|Writers Guild of America strike]]. The nominations were announced on December 12, 2008. ==Winners and nominees== [[File:Mickey Rourke Tribeca 2009 Shankbone.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Mickey Rourke]], Best Actor in a Motion Picture – Drama winner]] [[File:Mountain Between Us 08 (36835900520) (cropped).jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Kate Winslet]], Best Actress in a Motion Picture – Drama and Best Supporting Actress winner]] [[File:Colin Farrell by David Shankbone.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Colin Farrell]], Best Actor in a Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy winner]] [[File:MJK35110 Sally Hawkins (Maudie, Berlinale 2017) (cropped).jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Sally Hawkins]], Best Actress in a Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy winner]] [[File:Heath Ledger (Berlin Film Festival 2006) revised.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Heath Ledger]], Best Supporting Actor winner]] [[File:Gabriel Byrne 2010.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Gabriel Byrne]], Best Actor in a Television Series – Drama winner]] [[File:AnnaPaquinToronto2018 (cropped).jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Anna Paquin]], Best Actress in a Television Series – Drama winner]] [[File:Alec Baldwin 4 PETA Shankbone 2008.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Alec Baldwin]], Best Actor in a Television Series – Musical or Comedy winner]] [[File:Tina Fey Muppets Most Wanted Premiere (cropped 2).jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Tina Fey]], Best Actress in a Television Series – Musical or Comedy winner]] [[File:PaulGiamattiSept2013TIFF.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Paul Giamatti]], Best Actor in a Miniseries or Television Film winner]] [[File:Laura Linney 2016 (cropped).jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Laura Linney]], Best Actress in a Miniseries or Television Film winner]] [[File:Tom Wilkinson.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Tom Wilkinson]], Best Supporting Actor in a Series, Miniseries, or Television Film winner]] [[File:Laura Dern Deauville 2017.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Laura Dern]], Best Supporting Actress in a Series, Miniseries, or Television Film winner]] These are the nominees for the 66th Golden Globe Awards.
